sglang.title: fix: include CP size in PP rank offset
sglang.author: SSSunzt
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Fixes #29567.
The PP object-transfer paths use the DP attention rank to choose the point-to-point source and destination ranks. With context parallelism enabled, that offset also needs the CP dimension; otherwise a nonzero DP rank can target the matching CP slot from the wrong DP group.
This updates

sglang.title: Fix disaggregation receiver ZMQ cleanup
sglang.author: ronhuafeng
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Addresses the stale receiver ZMQ socket cleanup part of #28596.
On current main, decode-side heartbeat failure handling already removes stale
prefill metadata and calls CommonKVReceiver.disconnect_endpoint() for cached
receiver endpoints. The remaining receiver-side cached ZMQ PUSH socket

sglang.title: [NPU][Bugfix] Add scoring_func for mimo_v2
sglang.author: iridiumine
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
PR #29042 updated the NPU topk kernel to respect topk_config.scoring_func for norm_type selection. However, mimo_v2.py did not pass scoring_func to TopK , so it defaulted to "softmax" at the model level. For MiMo-V2.5 models configured with scoring_func="sigmoid" , this caused the NPU ker

sglang.title: Add stochastic rounding for FP16 Mamba SSM cache
sglang.author: danielafrimi
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

Add --enable-mamba-cache-stochastic-rounding and --mamba-cache-philox-rounds as general Mamba cache options.
Validate unsupported stochastic-rounding configurations early with actionable errors: FP16 SSM cache is required, CUDA is required, Triton SR requires SM100-family Blackwell, and Fla

sglang.author: ShangmingCai

Motivation
We have CI coverage for Pipeline Parallelism (PP) on its own and for Context Parallelism (CP) / DP attention on their own, but no test that exercises PP composed with another parallel strategy. Regressions in the cross-strategy
plumbing (e.g. the PP proxy layout interacting with CP-v2 met

sglang.author: yaof20
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Split 1/5 from #29349
Motivation
This PR fixes an SWA boundary bookkeeping bug in cache_unfinished_req.
Unfinished request insertion can happen after part of the request has already been evicted from the SWA window. The insert path needs that eviction boundary to distinguish live SWA KV from SWA tom

sglang.title: [diffusion] keep image-model auxiliary components resident under auto memory policy
sglang.author: mickqian
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
#26247's auto memory policy routes image-generation models through the generic layerwise-offload path, offloading their auxiliary components (text encoder, image encoder, VAE) to CPU. On a datacenter-class GPU with ample free memory this is pure overhead: nothing needs the freed VRAM, but

sglang.title: [Spec] Frozen-KV MTP: delay target KV binding to pool init + reset stale draft out_cache_loc
sglang.author: kpham-sgl

1. Delay target KV binding until pool init (closes #29021)

sglang.title: [sglang-miles] Fix post_process_weights deadlock in RL in-place mode

Restore the pause-aware locking behavior for post_process_weights on the sglang-miles-v0.5.13 branch.
This is the post_process_weights hunk from the earlier pause-aware deadlock fix in #22754, which appears to have been lost during the v0.5.13 tokenizer_control_mixin.py refactor.

sglang.title: CUDA graph executable dedup via cudaGraphExecUpdate
sglang.author: cctry

Motivation
When using breakable CUDA graphs (segmented capture), each batch size gets its own set of captured CUDA graph segments. Many of these segments are structurally identical across batch sizes -- same kernels, same topology, same launch parameters -- but each gets a separately instantiated cu

low-latency: TP8 + EAGLE MTP 5-1-6, chunked-prefill 8192, mem-fraction 0.85
bala

sglang.title: [Docs] Add --prerelease=allow so uv installs the latest sglang
sglang.author: zijiexia
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
The recommended uv pip install sglang in the get-started docs silently installs sglang 0.5.9 instead of the latest release.
Root cause:

sglang 0.5.10+ depend on flash-attn-4 (>=4.0.0b4 / >=4.0.0b9).
On PyPI, flash-attn-4 only publishes pre-releases (4.0.0b3 … 4.0.0b19); the only non-pre-

sglang.title: [GLM-5] Tune the threshold of router GEMM
sglang.author: b8zhong
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
It seem that it will be very difficult for microbenchmarks to the amount of PDL overlap with the next kernel (and thus E2E performance timing), even with cold L2 + CUPTI + CUDA graph, or warm L2 + CUDA graph. When Torch is using splitK mode for very small problem size. Caused by https://g

sglang.title: [cookbook] GLM-5.2 NVFP4 B300: TP8 recipe + 3 strategies
sglang.author: zijiexia
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Update the GLM-5.2 NVFP4 B300 cookbook entries. They previously shipped the TP4 layout with only low-latency + balanced. Replace them with the verified single-node 8×B300 TP8 recipe and add the missing high-throughput strategy, all measured on the lmsysorg/sglang:dev-glm52-nvfp4 preview i

sglang.title: [Speculative Decoding] Validate vocabulary compatibility in STANDALONE mode
sglang.author: jmamou
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
STANDALONE speculative decoding requires the draft model to share the same vocabulary as the target model. If the vocabularies differ, draft token IDs map to different strings in the target vocabulary, making the speculative decoding lossy — the output distribution no longer matches what

sglang.title: Fix bounded checkpoint prefetching and buffered drop-cache handling
sglang.author: mmangkad
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
This cleans up checkpoint prefetching by using a bounded thread pool and rejecting invalid thread counts instead of letting them hang. It also fixes the buffered safetensors loader so drop_cache_after_load actually runs for each shard, with tests covering the prefetch and drop-cache paths.

sglang.title: feat(mem_cache): page-major (layer-major within a page) KV/state layout
sglang.author: ch-wan
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
SGLang stores the KV cache (and Mamba conv/SSM state) as per-layer tensors — layer 0's slots, then layer 1's slots, etc. (a layer-major layout). Each token's K/V for a given layer is contiguous, but a single token/page is scattered across num_layers separate allocations.
This PR adds an o

sglang.title: [spec] Fix index_share_for_mtp_iteration being a no-op in EAGLE MTP draft
sglang.author: JustinTong0323
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Problem
index_share_for_mtp_iteration (#28192) is meant to run the DSA indexer once on the first MTP draft step and reuse its top-k for the remaining steps. It's a silent no-op — the reuse never engages, so every draft step recomputes the indexer.
Cause
Each draft step forwards on a copied ForwardBa

sglang.title: [DeepSeek V3] Reland: run routed experts on main stream in dual-stream MoE
sglang.author: kpham-sgl
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Reland of #29142, which was reverted in #29452 because it dropped test_moe_ep_extra.py's gsm8k from ~0.7 to 0.005.
Root cause
Not a cross-stream race. The hazard is a host-side mutation of the input tensor's metadata between two CUDA kernel launches inside the captured decode graph.
pytho

sglang.author: JackChuang
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
In the CUTLASS FP4 MoE pipeline, the path between GEMM1 and GEMM2 previously required 3 separate steps: allocate intermediate buffer → silu_and_mul → scaled_fp4_experts_quant. This PR fuses them into a single CUDA kernel silu_and_mul_scaled_fp4_experts_quant_packed, eliminating one intermedi

sglang.title: [Kernel] Add SM90 Q8KV8 FP8 Sparse MLA Prefill JIT Kernel with Tests and Benchmark
sglang.author: JackChuang
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
This PR adds a Q8KV8 FP8 sparse MLA prefill JIT kernel for SM90, together with its Python wrapper, correctness/accuracy tests, and performance benchmark.
This PR is part of the roadmap tracked in #25746 (PR1 of 2).
Takeaways

Performance: Q8KV8 is 1.15x - 1.31x faster than the Q16/BF16 Flash

Motivation
Server-based image warmup defaulted to an area-capped "representative" resolution (SERVER_WARMUP_IMAGE_MAX_AREA = 768×768). For larger real requests (e.g. 1024×1024) the first request still paid first-shape kernel autotuning — a ~0.1s residual measured on H100, even though warmup ran.
Fix

Summary
This fuses the small DSA metadata work that runs right before CUDA graph replay. The main path is _apply_cuda_graph_metadata, where decode, target-verify, and draft-extend replay used to launch a bunch of small PyTorch metadata ops.
The new path uses fused Triton kernels for replay metadata

#29075 moved the decode result D2H copy from forward_stream onto a dedicated copy_stream to overlap it with the next forward. On ROCm, however, every decode step now pays a cross-stream sync (copy_stream.wait_stream(forward_stream) + event gating), and that fixed cost outweighs the tiny

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Transformers backend: apply learned lm_head.bias for tied-embedding models
vllm.author: JohnLangford

The bug
vLLM's Transformers backend (CausalMixin, vllm/model_executor/models/transformers/causal.py) silently drops a learned lm_head.bias for tied-embedding models, producing garbage greedy output. Three independent failure points, all reached when tie_word_embeddings=True:

(A) self.skip_prefixes.

vllm.author: NickLucche
vllm.bodyExcerpt:

vllm.title: [XPU] [RMSNorm] revert weightless change on xpu

vllm.bodyExcerpt: On XPU, weightless RMSNorm (weight=None) introduced by PR falls back to the native eager implementation, which decomposes into many small aten ops (pow, mean, rsqrt, mul, add). At small batch sizes, where each kernel is tiny and the model is host/dispatch-bound, this fallback significantly increases

vllm.title: [ROCm][CI] Use spawn around the threaded OTLP test
vllm.author: AndreasKaratzas
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This stabilizes the tracing test on ROCm by avoiding fork-after-gRPC-thread startup and by explicitly cleaning up the engine after the assertion. The test starts a fake OTLP/gRPC server before constructing an LLM. That means the parent process already has gRPC worker threads alive when vLLM launches

what
